archimate:Grouping.name: Wide Area Networking
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: Wide Area Networking ABB is a Grouping of different of networks to enables communication and data exchange across geographically dispersed locations
Source: Gartner
Source reference: https://www.gartner.com/en/information-technology/glossary/wan-wide-area-network
LOST view: Technical view - infrastructure
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/WideAreaNetworkingGrouping
ABB name: eira:WideAreaNetworkingGrouping
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalInfrastructure

properties.value: Wide Area Networking ABB is a Grouping of different of networks to enables communication and data exchange across geographically dispersed locations
